experiments.name: Proof-first LinkedIn post
experiments.hypothesis: A post opening with real revenue math will drive more warm replies than a generic founder update.
experiments.setup: Post: '$280 AI ops -> $547 MRR. Here's what it actually returns right now.'

experiments.name: Paul direct conversion follow-up
experiments.hypothesis: A specific 48h live offer will convert better than a vague check-in.
experiments.setup: Send a direct email or DM with a concrete offer and simple next step.

experiments.name: Guarantee-based entry offer
experiments.hypothesis: A $299 entry offer with a clear refund promise lowers friction more than the current general offer.
experiments.setup: Draft a one-page offer around a fast outcome and a low-risk guarantee.
